mathFacultyGeneralRules.heading: No student may enrol in or graduate from:
rules: A stand-alone Bachelor of Computer Science (BCS) academic plan with any Bachelor of Mathematics (BMath) academic plan (including Joint Honours academic plans).
A stand-alone BMath Joint Honours academic plan with any non-Mathematics Joint Honours academic plan.

Data Science (BMath or BCS) with any other Faculty of Mathematics Honours or Joint Honours academic plan, except that the BCS (Data Science) can make up the BCS component of the Business Administration and Computer Science double degree program.
A stand-alone BCS Honours co-operative academic plan or BMath Honours co-operative academic plan with any stand-alone regular Honours academic plan (including Joint Honours academic plans).
